summary: While the role offers the predictable daytime hours and lack of on-call duties you prioritize, the core job requirements directly conflict with your preferred thinking style and sustainability goals. The necessity for fast-paced analytical reasoning and autonomous situational judgment is the opposite of your strength in procedural, protocol-driven work. Furthermore, the high emotional labor and significant burnout risk within the first few years make this an unsustainable path for maintaining personal wellbeing.
